vulnerability.reference: AI tutor reward model underrepresents diverse learning needs due to skewed student preference data.
vulnerability.generated: Educational AI tutors lack mechanisms to detect or correct reward model drift, leaving calibration gaps for subgroups unnoticed.

impact.reference: Underrepresented students receive generic, unhelpful feedback, exacerbating achievement gaps.
impact.generated: Underrepresented students receive unhelpful, misaligned feedback, worsening learning disparities and disproportionate disengagement.

dose_response.reference: In educational AI tutor alignment, federated DPO underrepresents diverse learner needs, giving unhelpful feedback to underrepresented students, widening achievement gaps and eroding trust.
dose_response.generated: Federated DPO with differential privacy degrades reward model calibration and coverage, through student exposure to AI tutors fine-tuned on private interactions, triggers undetected drift, leading to misaligned feedback that worsens learning disparities and disproportionate disengagement for underrepresented students.
